{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Technical Support Technician",
  "description": "TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the IT sector, is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Technical Support Technician

Job Location: Shomolu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Technical Support Technician, you will assist in the installation, servicing, and maintenance of technical equipment while supporting engineers in delivering quality technical solutions.


Responsibilities


	Assist with equipment installation, servicing, and maintenance activities
	Perform basic electrical wiring and equipment troubleshooting tasks
	Maintain service records and ensure proper use of tools and equipment
	Support preventive maintenance and adhere to safety procedures


Requirements


	OND or Technical School Certificate in Electrical Engineering, Electrical Installation, or a related field
	Basic knowledge of electrical wiring and the use of hand tools
	Good troubleshooting and technical problem-solving skills
	Ability to work effectively in a team and follow technical procedures.


Salary
N120,000 &ndash; N150,000 Monthly.",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-23",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-23",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Technical Support Technician Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the IT sector, is recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Technical Support Technician

Job Location: Shomolu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Technical Support Technician, you will assist in the installation, servicing, and maintenance of technical equipment while supporting engineers in delivering quality technical solutions.


Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Assist with equipment installation, servicing, and maintenance activities
	Perform basic electrical wiring and equipment troubleshooting tasks
	Maintain service records and ensure proper use of tools and equipment
	Support preventive maintenance and adhere to safety procedures


Requirements


	OND or Technical School Certificate in Electrical Engineering, Electrical Installation, or a related field
	Basic knowledge of electrical wiring and the use of hand tools
	Good troubleshooting and technical problem-solving skills
	Ability to work effectively in a team and follow technical procedures.


Salary
N120,000 – N150,000 Monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Customer Service Representative Job at TechSpace




        
    

        
        TechSpace is a dynamic IT company dedicated to providing innovative solutions to businesses and organizations. Our team of skilled professionals is committed to delivering cutting-edge technology services tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. With a focus on excellence, integrity, and customer satisfaction, we strive to empower businesses with the tools they need to succeed in today's digital landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

            
    




	We're looking for a customer-focused individual to join our team. If you're organized, creative, and great with people, this might be your next role.


Responsibilities


	Manage incoming phone calls
	Manage all social media platforms
	Client & Visitor Reception


Requirements
Must-Have Skills:


	Social media savvy
	Proficiency with CapCut, Canva, or similar design tools
	Strong attention to detail
	Excellent communication skills


Who You Are:


	Friendly, approachable, and customer-oriented
	Result Driven
	Able to multitask and stay organized under pressure
	Self-motivated with the ability to work both independently and as part of a team.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] , and cc: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Office Assistant Job at Exclusive Schools




        
    

        
        At Exclusive Schools, Kwale, we are committed to nurturing young minds, building character and promoting excellence in education. We are looking for passionate, dedicated, and hardworking individuals to join our team and help us make a lasting impact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Office Assistant

Job Location: Kwale, Delta

Role Summary
     

            
    




	Organized, reliable, and detail-oriented individuals to support daily administrative and operational activities.


Method of Application

Business Development Manager Job at EmDam Strategies Limited




        
    

        
        EmDam Strategies Limited - Our client is recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Business Development Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

            
    




	Are you passionate about technology, driven by results, and good at building strong client relationships? If you’re ready to grow your career and make an impact in the technology sector, this opportunity could be for you.
	Our client is looking for an experienced Business Development Manager to drive business growth through strategic account management, solution selling, strong customer relationship management, new business acquisition and achievement of sales targets.


What You Bring


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Management or related fields
	3 - 5 years of experience in B2B IT sales
	A proven track record of achieving sales targets
	Excellent presentation, negotiation, and relationship management skills.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Training and development
	Bonus and commission
	Condusive work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using Job Position as the subject of the mail. 

Note: Only qualified candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cashier",
  "description": "Swift Consulting Limited is a professional services firm specializing in Education Consulting, Human Resource Management, and Management Consulting. We connect top talent with leading organizations across industries.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a trustworthy, detail-oriented, and organized Cashier to join our cooperative society.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for handling daily cash transactions, processing loan repayments and disbursements, maintaining accurate financial records, and providing excellent customer service to members while ensuring compliance with the cooperative&#39;s financial policies.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive and process loan repayments, savings deposits, and other member payments.
	Disburse approved loans to members in line with established procedures.
	Issue receipts for all transactions and maintain proper documentation.
	Balance the cash drawer and reconcile daily cash transactions.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly cash reports.
	Maintain accurate records of all cash inflows and outflows.
	Deposit cash into designated bank accounts when required.
	Ensure the security and confidentiality of cash and financial records.
	Respond professionally to members&#39; inquiries regarding payments and transactions.
	&nbsp;Work closely with the Accounts and Loan Officers to ensure accurate financial records.
	Report any cash discrepancies or suspicious transactions immediately.
	Perform other duties as assigned by management.


Requirements


	OND in Accounting, Banking &amp; Finance, Business Administration, Economics, or a related discipline.
	1 &ndash; 2 years of experience as a Cashier, Teller, or in a similar financial role.
	Experience in a microfinance bank, cooperative society, or financial institution is an added advantage.
	Good knowledge of cash handling procedures and basic accounting principles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, especially Excel.
	Excellent numerical, organizational, and record-keeping skills.
	Strong integrity, honesty, and attention to detail.
	Good communication and customer service skills.
	Ability to work under pressure with minimal supervision.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hireme@swiftconsulting.com.ng using &quot;Cashier- Financial Institution&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Cashier Job at Swift Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Swift Consulting Limited is a professional services firm specializing in Education Consulting, Human Resource Management, and Management Consulting. We connect top talent with leading organizations across industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	We are seeking a trustworthy, detail-oriented, and organized Cashier to join our cooperative society.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for handling daily cash transactions, processing loan repayments and disbursements, maintaining accurate financial records, and providing excellent customer service to members while ensuring compliance with the cooperative's financial policies.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive and process loan repayments, savings deposits, and other member payments.
	Disburse approved loans to members in line with established procedures.
	Issue receipts for all transactions and maintain proper documentation.
	Balance the cash drawer and reconcile daily cash transactions.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly cash reports.
	Maintain accurate records of all cash inflows and outflows.
	Deposit cash into designated bank accounts when required.
	Ensure the security and confidentiality of cash and financial records.
	Respond professionally to members' inquiries regarding payments and transactions.
	 Work closely with the Accounts and Loan Officers to ensure accurate financial records.
	Report any cash discrepancies or suspicious transactions immediately.
	Perform other duties as assigned by management.


Requirements


	OND in Accounting, Banking & Finance, Business Administration, Economics, or a related discipline.
	1 – 2 years of experience as a Cashier, Teller, or in a similar financial role.
	Experience in a microfinance bank, cooperative society, or financial institution is an added advantage.
	Good knowledge of cash handling procedures and basic accounting principles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, especially Excel.
	Excellent numerical, organizational, and record-keeping skills.
	Strong integrity, honesty, and attention to detail.
	Good communication and customer service skills.
	Ability to work under pressure with minimal supervision.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Cashier- Financial Institution" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
